ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "customer_email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "customer_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "customer_address" TEXT /* Full address of the customer */,
  "customer_join_date" TEXT /* Date the customer joined the platform */,
  "customer_status" TEXT /* Status of the customer (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the customer */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region of the customer */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the customer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the customer */,
  "postal_code" TEXT /* Postal code of the customer */,
  "segment" TEXT /* Segment of the customer (e.g., Corporate, Home Office) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_segment FOREIGN KEY ("segment") REFERENCES segments ("segment_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_city FOREIGN KEY ("city") REFERENCES cities ("city_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_region FOREIGN KEY ("region") REFERENCES regions ("region_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_country FOREIGN KEY ("country") REFERENCES countries ("country_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_state FOREIGN KEY ("state") REFERENCES states ("state_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "ship_date" TEXT /* Date the order was shipped */,
  "ship_mode" TEXT /* Mode of shipping (e.g., Economy, Immediate, Economy Plus) */,
  "order_total_amount" TEXT /* Total amount of the order */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., Pending, Shipped, Delivered, Cancelled) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the order (e.g., Credit Card, PayPal) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the order (for internal tracking) */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the order (for internal tracking) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_ship_mode FOREIGN KEY ("ship_mode") REFERENCES shipping_modes ("ship_mode_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipments" (
  "shipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipment */,
  "order_id" TEXT /* ID of the order being shipped */,
  "ship_date" TEXT /* Date the shipment was made */,
  "ship_mode" TEXT /* Mode of shipping (e.g., Economy, Immediate, Economy Plus) */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Address to which the shipment was made */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the shipment */,
  "carrier" TEXT /* Name of the shipping carrier (e.g., UPS, FedEx) */,
  "estimated_delivery_date" TEXT /* Estimated date of delivery */,
  "actual_delivery_date" TEXT /* Actual date of delivery */,
  "shipment_status" TEXT /* Status of the shipment (e.g., In Transit, Delivered, Returned) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipments_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 code for the country (e.g., US, CA) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country to which the state belongs */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state to which the city belongs */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "segments" (
  "segment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each segment */,
  "segment_name" TEXT /* Name of the segment (e.g., Corporate, Home Office) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the segment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("segment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipping_modes" (
  "ship_mode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipping mode */,
  "ship_mode_name" TEXT /* Name of the shipping mode (e.g., Economy, Immediate, Economy Plus) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the shipping mode */,
  "cost" TEXT /* Cost associated with the shipping mode */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ship_mode_id")
)
column_names: Date the customer joined the platform
Status of the customer (e.g., Active, Inactive)
